allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell(Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$HOME\\.config\\gh\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell($env:APPDATA; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI"; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
